title: Roasted Crispy Peruvian Shallots Skewers
description: A crispy and savory lacto-vegetarian Peruvian dish featuring roasted shallots, perfect for a midnight craving. This recipe uses a yakimono-grill to achieve the perfect crunch.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the shallots onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the shallots, making sure they are fully coated.
Grill the shallots for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the shallots from the grill and sprinkle with feta cheese and cilantro.
Let the shallots cool for a few minutes before serving, if desired.
Garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
